title: commelina monticola var. vestita
intro: Commelina monticola var. vestita, also known as the hairy whorled comelina, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Commelinaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Commelina monticola var. vestita are said to include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves and roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption.
